Crab apple tree, very tart at the beginning of the season but if you pick towards the end of fall they can be very sweet and tasty. Many crab apple trees in this lot, just labeled one. Access: Private but overhanging. Falling Fruit season: September-November.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.

Crabapple , a lot of fruit on the tree. This tree had a more red variety than the other tree listed in the lot, a little sweeter and less tart. Access: Private but overhanging. Falling Fruit season: September-November.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
